topics.name: ND I & ND II: Digital Electronics, Computer Hardware & Workshop Practice (IMT)
topics.description: CET 111 Digital Logic, CET 121 Computer Hardware, CET 211 Microprocessor Fundamentals.

subtopics.name: CET 111 & CET 121: Digital Logic and Computer Hardware Maintenance at IMT
objectives: Design and test combinational and sequential logic circuits using NAND, NOR, and XOR gates
Diagnose and repair PC components including motherboards, RAM, storage devices, and power supply units

subtopics.name: CET 211: Microprocessor Architecture and Assembly Programming
objectives: Describe the architecture of 8-bit and 16-bit microprocessors (Intel 8085/8086) and their instruction sets
Write, assemble, and execute simple assembly language programs for data manipulation and I/O control

topics.name: HND I & HND II: Embedded Systems, Networking & IMT Final Project
topics.description: CET 311 Embedded Systems, CET 321 Computer Networking, CET 411 Software Development, CET 499 HND Project.

subtopics.name: CET 311 & CET 321: Embedded Systems and Computer Networking at IMT
objectives: Program Arduino/PIC microcontrollers for real-world control and automation applications
Configure Local Area Networks (LAN), TCP/IP addressing, and basic network troubleshooting in IMT labs

subtopics.name: CET 499: IMT HND Computer Engineering Technology Final Project
objectives: Design, build, and test a hardware/software system solving a practical engineering or automation problem
Present technical report and defend HND project before NBTE and IMT Engineering Technology faculty
